name: Low Cal Graham Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed graham crackers, melted margarine, and sugar in a 9-inch pie tin.
2. Mix well with a fork.
3. Press the mixture evenly around the edges and on the bottom of the pie tin.
4. Bake at 350°F for 6 minutes.
5. Cool and fill as desired.
6. Cut into 8 even portions.
Nutritive value for 1 portion (1/8 of recipe): CAL 78; CHO 8 gm; PRO 1 gm; FAT 5 gm; Na 100 mg
Food exchanges per serving: 1/2 bread, 1 fat
Low sodium diets: Use salt-free margarine
